item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Kuncinya adalah bagaimana kekuatan negara digunakan untuk memperkuat, bukan merusak, kebebasan individu.

notes: Aligned Indonesian-persona transcript. Agent A opens clearly society-priority, then moves toward a more rights-bounded position while still defending collective policy and public order. Agent B stays mostly balanced throughout, emphasizing that collective interests and individual protections must be negotiated, with concern for minority voices and uneven enforcement. No complete reversal.
